subject: VPN keeps dropping — very frustrated
description:
Hi IT Support,

I'm having VPN connectivity issues that started after last week's Windows update. Every time I undock my laptop and move to Wi-Fi, GlobalProtect VPN drops and I have to manually reconnect. This happens consistently on Floor 6 in the NYC office.

I wanted to provide as much context as possible so you can understand the full situation. Our team has been working on the quarterly deliverables and the VPN disconnections are really affecting productivity. Multiple people on my floor have mentioned similar issues but I'm not sure if they filed tickets. The Wi-Fi signal seems fine for everything else — browsing, Teams calls, etc. It's specifically the VPN that drops. I've been tracking this for the past week and it happens at least 3-4 times per day, always when I switch from my docking station to wireless. I wanted to provide as much context as possible so you can understand the full situation. Our team has been working on the quarterly deliverables and the VPN disconnections are really affecting productivity. Multiple people on my floor have mentioned similar issues but I'm not sure if they filed tickets. subject: Can't open email attachments — error screenshot attached inline
description:
Outlook is showing an error when I try to open attachments. Here's what I see:

[Inline image: screenshot of error]
data:image/png;base64,

The error says 'Protected View — This file originated from an Internet location and might be unsafe.' I can't click 'Enable Editing' — the button is grayed out. This is happening with all PDF attachments from external clients. Started this morning.

subject: SAP account locked out
description:
Hi IT Team,

I need a password reset for my SAP account. I've been locked out since this morning after entering the wrong password 3 times. My SAP username is lpark01.

Accountlpark01
SystemSAP ERP (Production)
Last successful login2026-03-17 08:45 EST

I need this resolved before noon — month-end close depends on it.

Sent from Outlook for iOS

subject: Re: Re: Re: Shared mailbox not sending — STILL BROKEN
description:
Quick update — the shared mailbox issue is still happening. finance-reports@contoso.com is bouncing external emails as of 8 AM today. Clients are not receiving their quarterly statements.

-------- Original Message --------
From: Linda Park <linda.park@contoso.com>
To: IT Support <support@contoso.com>
Date: March 17, 2026 at 4:15 PM
Subject: Re: Shared mailbox not sending

Hi, I reported this yesterday and was told it was fixed. It's not. Please escalate.

-------- Original Message --------
From: IT Support <support@contoso.com>
To: Linda Park <linda.park@contoso.com>
Date: March 16, 2026 at 2:30 PM
Subject: Re: Shared mailbox not sending

Hi Linda, we've adjusted the mail flow rules. Please try again and let us know if the issue persists.

-------- Original Message --------
From: Linda Park <linda.park@contoso.com>
To: IT Support <support@contoso.com>
Date: March 16, 2026 at 11:00 AM
Subject: Shared mailbox not sending

Hi, the finance-reports shared mailbox can't send external emails. Getting NDR bounce messages. Started this morning.

subject: screen   flickering     issue
description:
Hi     ,


     My      laptop      screen      is       flickering      .



     It     started      yesterday       afternoon     .


			I     tried     restarting     but     it      still      happens.




     The     screen      goes       black      for      a     second
     then      comes      back      .



     It's      a      Dell      Latitude      5540      .





     Please       help     .






     Thanks     ,
     Wei     Chen

subject: 🚨 Café kiosk Wi-Fi down — London lobby 🚨
description:
🚨🚨🚨 URGENT 🚨🚨🚨

Our café ☕ kiosk in the London office lobby can't connect to Wi-Fi anymore!!! 😤😤

The kiosk runs a digital signage app that shows the café menu and Contoso branding. It was working fine until the network maintenance last night.

Model: Samsung Tizen display with built-in Wi-Fi
Location: Building 2, Ground Floor, Café "Thé Crème"
SSID it should connect to: Contoso-Guest-IoT

The display shows «Impossible de se connecter au réseau» (French error — we think the locale got changed somehow 🤷‍♂️)

Please fix ASAP — we have clients visiting tomorrow and an empty screen in the lobby looks très unprofessional 😬

Merci beaucoup! 🙏✨
— François Müller-Østergaard

subject: Blue screen crashes — all evidence attached
description: My laptop has been crashing with a blue screen (BSOD) about 3 times a day for the past week. The stop code is DRIVER_IRQL_NOT_LESS_OR_EQUAL. I've taken a screenshot every time it happens and exported every log I could find. All 55 files are attached. The crashes seem to happen when I'm using Teams and Outlook simultaneously. Dell Latitude 7440, Windows 11 23H2.

Alert Target IDs: /subscriptions/a1b2c3d4/resourceGroups/rg-web-prod/providers/Microsoft.Web/sites/app-contoso-web-prod
Dimensions:
  - StatusCode: 500
  - Instance: app-contoso-web-prod_0
  - HttpMethod: GET, POST
Affected Endpoints: /api/v2/clients, /api/v2/transactions

Action Required: Investigate HTTP 5xx spike on the client-facing web application.

subject: VPN断开 — Singapore office VPN disconnection
description:
Hi IT Support,

我的VPN连接在新加坡办公室一直断开。(My VPN connection keeps disconnecting in the Singapore office.)

Details:
- 使用的是 GlobalProtect VPN client
- 每次连接大约持续10分钟就断开 (disconnects after ~10 minutes each time)
- Wi-Fi信号很好,其他应用没问题 (Wi-Fi signal is strong, other apps work fine)
- 同事们没有这个问题 (colleagues don't have this issue)

昨天下午重启了电脑,问题仍然存在。
(Restarted laptop yesterday afternoon, problem persists.)

ネットワークチームに確認してください。
(Please check with the network team.)

よろしくお願いします。
谢谢！
Yuki Watanabe

subject: 403 errors on multiple internal apps — list of URLs inside
description:
We're getting 403 Forbidden errors on several internal applications:

WORKING:
- https://portal.contoso.com/dashboard — OK
- https://wiki.contoso.com/engineering — OK
- https://git.contoso.com/ — OK
- https://ci.contoso.com/pipelines — OK
- https://monitoring.contoso.com/grafana — OK

NOT WORKING (403 Forbidden):
- https://reports.contoso.com/finance/q1 — 403
- https://reports.contoso.com/compliance/audit — 403
- https://reports.contoso.com/risk/dashboard — 403
- https://api.contoso.com/v2/reports — 403
- https://api.contoso.com/v2/analytics — 403

Looks like everything under reports.contoso.com and the /v2/ API paths on api.contoso.com are returning 403. Started happening about an hour ago. Multiple people in Finance and Compliance are affected. We checked and our Azure AD group membership hasn't changed.

Possibly related to the Azure Front Door rule change that was deployed at 5 AM?

subject: Password reset needed
description:
Can you reset my Outlook password? I think it expired.
